# macOS
.DS_Store
.AppleDouble
.LSOverride
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db
*.trashed

# Archivos temporales
*.swp
*.swo
*~
.tmp
.temp
*.tmp
*.temp
~$*

# Archivos de Word
~$*.docx
~$*.doc
*.wbk

# Editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.sublime-*

# Logs
*.log

# OS generated files
desktop.ini
$RECYCLE.BIN/

# Ocultos comunes
.*.swp
.*.swo
.*.un~
